content.speakerText: Your new flight is confirmed for the 15th at 10 a.m. You'll get an email shortly.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的新航班已确认，15号上午10点，稍后会发邮件。

options.text: Great! Can you send me the receipt now?
Thank you so much — you’ve saved me!
I don’t think this time works for me.
Can you change it again? I need a later flight.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thank you so much — you’ve saved me!' 是对服务成功完成的自然、礼貌的感谢回应，符合道别确认场景。其他选项要么提出新请求（opt_1, opt_4），要么否定确认（opt_3），不符合语境。

content.speakerText: Your reservation has been successfully updated. The boarding pass will be emailed to you.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的预订已成功更新，登机牌将通过邮件发送。

options.text: Okay, I’ll call you back if there’s a problem.
Thanks for your help. Have a great day!
Why didn’t you confirm it earlier?
Can you upgrade my seat now?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks for your help. Have a great day!' 是礼貌、自然的结束语，符合道别确认场景。opt_1 和 opt_4 引入新请求，opt_3 表达抱怨，均不符合积极结束对话的语境。

content.speakerText: All changes are processed. You’re all set for your trip.
content.speakerTextCn: 所有变更已处理完毕，您的行程已安排妥当。

options.text: Do I need to check in online?
Can you confirm my baggage allowance?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Perfect! Thanks a lot. Goodbye!' 表达了满意、感谢和礼貌道别，是道别确认场景的典型回应。opt_1 语气消极，opt_3 和 opt_4 提出新问题，打断对话结束流程。

content.template: Thank you so much — you’ve ___ me!
content.hint: 这是对话中表达强烈感激的经典表达，强调对方解决了紧急问题。
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：save someone（救了某人，比喻解决了困境）

content.hint: 在正式道别时，常与 'Appreciate it.' 连用，简洁礼貌。
content.knowledgePoint: 日常道别高频搭配：Appreciate it. Bye.

content.hint: 口语中常用 'Got it' 表示‘明白了/收到了’，常用于确认信息后快速回应。
content.knowledgePoint: 口语确认表达：Got it（收到，明白了）

content.speakerText: Your new flight is confirmed for the 15th at 10 a.m. You'll get an email shortly.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的新航班已确认，15号上午10点，稍后会发邮件。
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much! I really appreciate it.
Got it, thanks a lot. Bye!
That’s perfect — thank you for your help. Have a nice day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达感谢并确认信息已接收
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合口语习惯，语气礼貌且不拖沓
关键词覆盖：使用了 thank / appreciate / got it / bye 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: All changes have been successfully processed. Your updated itinerary is now confirmed.
content.speakerTextCn: 所有变更已成功处理，您的更新行程已确认。
expectedAnswers: Great! Thanks for your help. Bye!
Appreciate it. I’ll check my email soon.
Perfect — thank you so much. Have a good one!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达感谢并结束对话，未提出新问题
语言准确性：用词和结构符合口语规范
表达自然度：语调自然，符合真实对话节奏
关键词覆盖：使用了 appreciate / thank / bye / perfect / great 等道别关键词

content.speakerText: Your ticket has been reissued. You’re all set for your trip.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的机票已重开，您的行程已安排妥当。
expectedAnswers: Confirmed! Thanks a bunch. See you on the plane!
Awesome — I really appreciate your help. Goodbye!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否传达感激之情并自然结束通话
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：语气真诚、口语化，符合服务结束场景
关键词覆盖：使用了 thank / appreciate / confirmed / relief / goodbye 等核心表达
